title: Add forward_one() to DecoderLayer for KV-cache decode
description:
Add a `forward_one()` method to `DecoderLayer` in `decoder_layer.rs` that processes a single token using the KV-cache. This method:
1. Takes `(hidden: &[f32], cache_layer: &mut KVCacheLayer, pos: usize)` where hidden is [1, hidden_size]
2. Computes Q, K, V projections for the single token (seq_len=1)
3. Appends new K, V to the cache layer via `cache_layer.append()`
4. Computes attention scores: Q (1 token) against full cached K (pos+1 tokens)
5. Applies causal attention (no masking needed since Q is always the latest token)
6. Computes output projection and FFN as normal
7. Returns hidden state [1, hidden_size]

The key difference from `forward()` is: attention reads from cache instead of computing K/V for all tokens.

**Tests (REQUIRED):**
- Single layer: forward_one() output at position N matches forward() output's last position when given same input
- KV-cache values after forward_one() match K/V computed by full forward() at same positions
- Test with GQA (n_kv_heads < n_heads) to verify head expansion works correctly
